synopsis:
The High Republic Adventures (2022) Volume 2
This is a canon trade paperback that collects issues from the Dark Horse Comics The High Republic Adventures (2022) Series
The Battle of Jedha, the biggest event in the High Republic cross-platform initiative, reaches it’s climax in this stunning conclusion to Star Wars The High Republic Adventures, Phase II!
As the Jedi Order desperately tries to end the conflict that rages through the streets of the Holy City, Padawan Sav Malagan struggles to maintain her secret identity as she tries to free captain Maz Kanata from the clutches of the Dank Graks. As Arkik Von’s dark plan plays out, Sav will have to make the most difficult decision of her young life: duty to the Force, or loyalty to her friends?
COLLECTING: The High Republic Adventures (2022) #5-8.
title: The High Republic Adventures (2022): Volume 2
